display.purpose: Page-level hero titles. One per page maximum — compass path header, setup wizard welcome.

headline.purpose: Section headings, modal titles, major card group labels.

title.purpose: Card titles, step labels, tab headings.

body.purpose: All descriptive copy. Max 65–75ch line length.

label.purpose: Metadata, chip text, input labels, nav links, status counts.

mono.purpose: All numeric data — fit scores, dates, ATS keyword counts, IDs, generated strings. IBM Plex Mono only.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Never use bounce or elastic.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Nav collapses, 2-col grids drop to 1-col, font sizes step down.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: 3-col tool grids drop to 2-col, side panels may stack.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action. One per screen. Always teal.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0E9B8A; color: #EAF4FF; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #07C5B0; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #07C5B0; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #0b8278; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary and cancel actions. Transparent at rest, Nocturne on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #C8DDF0; padding: 10px 20px; border: 1px solid #1E3248; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #0F1E30; border-color: #4A6580; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0E9B8A; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: #142030; }

components.name: Chip
components.description: Role selection, ATS keyword tags, filter pills. Two states: default and selected.
components.html: Product ManagerSoftware Engineer
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #142030; color: #C8DDF0; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #1E3248; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.02em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #4A6580; color: #EAF4FF; } .ds-chip--selected { background: #0E9B8A; border-color: #0E9B8A; color: #EAF4FF; } .ds-chip--selected:hover { background: #07C5B0; border-color: #07C5B0; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container. Full border, 12px radius, 24px padding.
components.html:
CV Tailor

Rewrite your CV bullets to match any job description in seconds.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #142030; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #1E3248; padding: 24px; } .ds-card__title { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #EAF4FF; margin: 0 0 8px; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card__body { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; color: #C8DDF0; margin: 0; line-height: 1.65; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Standard labelled text input with teal focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field__label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #C8DDF0; letter-spacing: 0.03em; } .ds-field__input { background: #0F1E30; border: 1px solid #1E3248; border-radius: 8px; color: #EAF4FF; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; padding: 10px 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-field__input::placeholder { color: #4A6580; } .ds-field__input:focus { border-color: #0E9B8A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(14, 155, 138, 0.15); }

components.name: Nav Bar
components.description: Fixed top navigation with blur backdrop. Storm Gray links, Near White for active.
components.html: HubCV TailorCompassPipeline
components.css: .ds-topbar { background: rgba(15, 30, 48, 0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 0 24px; height: 52px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1E3248; } .ds-nav-item { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #4A6580; text-decoration: none; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 6px; transition: color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #C8DDF0; background: rgba(20, 32, 48, 0.8); } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #EAF4FF; } .ds-nav-item--active:hover { background: none; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0E9B8A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Kanban Card
components.description: Pipeline application card. Compact layout — company, role, date, status badge in one block.
components.html:
Atlassian
Senior Product Manager
12 Apr 2026Interview
components.css: .ds-kanban-card { background: #142030; border: 1px solid #1E3248; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; cursor: grab; transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-kanban-card:hover { border-color: #4A6580; background: #192840; } .ds-kanban-card__company { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #4A6580; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-kanban-card__role { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #EAF4FF; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-kanban-card__meta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-kanban-card__date { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #4A6580; } .ds-kanban-card__status { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-kanban-card__status--applied { background: rgba(74, 101, 128, 0.2); color: #4A6580; } .ds-kanban-card__status--interview { background: rgba(245, 166, 35, 0.12); color: #F5A623; } .ds-kanban-card__status--offer { background: rgba(46, 204, 143, 0.12); color: #2ECC8F; } .ds-kanban-card__status--rejected { background: rgba(232, 80, 74, 0.12); color: #E8504A; }

components.name: Score Circle
components.description: JD Analyser fit grade. A–F letter in a bordered circle, colour-coded by grade band.
components.css: .ds-score-circle { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 88px; height: 88px; border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid; gap: 2px; } .ds-score-circle--a { border-color: #2ECC8F; color: #2ECC8F; } .ds-score-circle--b { border-color: #07C5B0; color: #07C5B0; } .ds-score-circle--c { border-color: #F5A623; color: #F5A623; } .ds-score-circle--d { border-color: #E8504A; color: #E8504A; } .ds-score-circle--f { border-color: #E8504A; color: #E8504A; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-score-circle__grade { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; } .ds-score-circle__label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4A6580; }

narrative.overview:
Career Ops is the advisor in the room who already knows the system. It doesn't explain itself. It doesn't perform energy it hasn't earned. It gives you an edge through calm precision — one clear action at a time, no noise, no theatrics. The interface is the argument for the tool's competence. If the UI is trustworthy, the AI output is trustworthy.

The visual language is dark-first — not because dark looks technical, but because users arrive at night, after a long day of work, with a job description open in another tab. The surface should feel like a prepared desk, not a landing page. Generous spacing is not a luxury; it is a deliberate reduction of cognitive load for users navigating a stressful process in a second language, in an unfamiliar market.

This system rejects everything that signals 'someone made this to look good in a Dribbble screenshot.' No gradient text. No purple accents. No hero metrics. No identical card grids. No startup hype.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first, with a distinct warm-linen light theme reserved for the setup wizard
Tonal depth through four background layers — no shadows
One accent color (Advisor Teal) used sparingly; semantic colors reserved for meaning
IBM Plex Sans throughout — institutional clarity, excellent multilingual rendering
IBM Plex Mono for all data-heavy contexts: scores, IDs, dates, codes
Breathing room as a deliberate design choice — never compressed, never cluttered

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Teal is the only accent that appears on dark-theme pages. Amber, red, and green are semantic signals — they communicate status, never decoration.

rules.name: The Semantic Lock Rule
rules.body: Amber, red, and green are reserved for job application status semantics: opportunity/interview/warning (amber), rejection/destructive (red), offer/success (green). Using any of these colours in a non-semantic context violates the system's trust model.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: IBM Plex Sans handles every typographic role. No decorative or display serif is introduced. Weight and size create hierarchy; a second typeface is not needed.

rules.name: The Depth Rule
rules.body: Layer by colour, never by shadow. If you find yourself reaching for box-shadow as a decorative tool, reconsider the tonal hierarchy instead.

dos: Do use Advisor Teal (#0E9B8A) on ≤10% of any given screen. Its scarcity is what gives it authority.
Do use IBM Plex Mono for every numeric, date, score, and code context — even when the surrounding text is IBM Plex Sans.
Do apply full borders on all four sides of cards and inputs. Never a side-stripe.
Do use semantic colours (amber/red/green) only for their assigned job-search statuses. Never reuse them for decoration.
Do leave breathing room. 24px internal card padding is the minimum.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. All transitions should be gated.
Do use the Warm Linen light theme exclusively for setup.html. Every other page is dark.
Do provide visible focus indicators on every interactive element — outline or box-shadow in Advisor Teal.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a coloured accent stripe on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Single solid colour only.
Don't reach for purple. Career Ops has no purple in its palette.
Don't replicate startup hype: gradient backgrounds, hero metrics, bouncing animations, social proof badge layouts.
Don't build identical card grids (same-size cards, icon + heading + body text, repeated endlessly).
Don't use bouncy or elastic easing. All motion uses ease-out curves only.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Animate transform and opacity only.
Don't introduce a second accent colour. Amber, red, and green are semantic locks.
Don't nest cards. A card inside a card is always the wrong answer.
Don't use #000 or #FFF. The bounds are Deep Ink (#07111E) and Near White (#EAF4FF).
Don't import Syne, Instrument Serif, or Inter. IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono only.
